title: charter synthesize --adapter fixture --dry-run --json (envelope)
description: Strict envelope emitted by `spec-kitty charter synthesize --adapter fixture --dry-run --json`. Must be exactly one JSON document on stdout. Locks behavior for FR-003. Field set is illustrative — WP01 research must confirm against current CLI output and update before WP03 commits.

result.description: Outcome marker. `success` indicates the dry-run plan was produced without errors.

adapter.description: Adapter identity, e.g. `fixture`. Echoed from the invocation.

planned_artifacts.description: List of paths the non-dry-run synthesize would write.

path.description: Project-relative path under .kittify/doctrine/ that synthesize would create.

warnings.description: Optional structured diagnostics. Used to fold SaaS sync warnings INTO the envelope instead of leaking them to stdout (FR-005).
